title: doctor command only checks tmux is installed, not version compatibility
body: Tmuxinator::Doctor.installed? just runs 'type tmux > /dev/null'. It doesn't check the actual tmux version against TMUX_MASTER_VERSION-style compatibility logic used elsewhere, so 'tmuxinator doctor' reports everything fine even when the installed tmux is too old for a project's config.

title: XDG_CONFIG_HOME with a trailing slash produces a doubled path
body: Config.xdg does File.join(config_home, "tmuxinator") after expanding XDG_CONFIG_HOME, but when the env var has a trailing slash, File.expand_path plus File.join ends up producing a path with an extra separator that some downstream FileUtils calls choke on.

title: start -p PATH bypasses TMUXINATOR_CONFIG resolution inconsistently
body: Running 'tmuxinator start -p ./some/project.yml' seems to load the file directly without going through the same directory-resolution logic (environment/xdg/home) that Config.directory uses for named projects, so hooks relative to the config directory don't behave the same way.

title: wemux support isn't mentioned in the CLI help text
body: lib/tmuxinator/wemux_support.rb clearly adds wemux-specific behavior, but the COMMANDS hash in cli.rb doesn't document anywhere that wemux integration exists or how to enable it.

title: Pre/post window hooks swallow errors silently
body: If a pre_window or post hook command defined in a project's yml fails, lib/tmuxinator/hooks.rb and hooks/project.rb don't seem to surface the failure to the user — the session just starts as if nothing happened, making broken hooks hard to notice.
